The Competition

Are you fast enough to beat the record?

Prepare your appetite! Check the details below:

Rules

  • You will have 1 hour to eat as much as you can and try to beat the record.
  • You can't leave the edge.
  • Use of cutlery is optional.

Days

Thursdays & Sundays

Every Thursdays and Sundays of the month

Time

From 19:00

Arrive 30min early.

Record so far: 43 slices
